# Coptic.io
> Coptic Orthodox liturgical calendar, daily readings, and API

Coptic.io provides Coptic Orthodox calendar data, scripture readings, feast days, fasting periods, prayer hours (Agpeya), and synaxarium (saint commemorations).

## API Base URL
https://api.coptic.io

## OpenAPI Spec
https://api.coptic.io/openapi.json

## Authentication
No authentication required. All endpoints are public.

## Endpoints

### Calendar
Convert Gregorian dates to Coptic dates and get calendar data.

GET /api/calendar
  Returns today's Coptic date.
  Response: { dateString, day, month, year, monthString }

GET /api/calendar/{date}
  Convert a Gregorian date to Coptic.
  Param: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  Example: GET /api/calendar/2025-01-07
  Response: { dateString: "29 Kiahk 1741 AM", day: 29, month: 4, year: 1741, monthString: "Kiahk" }

GET /api/calendar/month/{year}/{month}
  Get a full calendar month with Coptic dates and fasting info.
  Example: GET /api/calendar/month/2025/3
  Response: { year, month, monthName, days: [{ gregorianDate, copticDate, fasting }], copticMonths }

### Daily Readings (Katameros)
Get the daily scripture readings from the Coptic Katameros.

GET /api/readings
  Returns today's readings.

GET /api/readings/{date}
  Param: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  Query: lang (en|ar|es|cop, default: en), detailed (true|false, default: false)
  Example: GET /api/readings/2025-01-07?lang=en&detailed=true
  Response: Daily readings including vespers, matins, pauline epistle, catholic epistle, acts, psalm, and gospel.

### Fasting
Check fasting status and get fasting calendars.

GET /api/fasting
  Returns today's fasting status.
  Response: { isFasting: true, fastType: "Great Lent", description: "..." }

GET /api/fasting/{date}
  Param: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  Example: GET /api/fasting/2025-03-15

GET /api/fasting/calendar/{year}
  Get all fasting days for a year.
  Param: year (1900-2100)
  Example: GET /api/fasting/calendar/2025
  Response: [{ date, copticDate, fastType, description }]

### Liturgical Seasons
Determine the current liturgical season and fasting periods.

GET /api/season
  Returns the current liturgical season.
  Response: { date, season, description, startDate, endDate, isFasting, type }

GET /api/season/{date}
  Param: date (YYYY-MM-DD)

GET /api/season/year/{year}
  Get all liturgical seasons for a year.
  Param: year (1900-2199)
  Response: { year, seasons: [{ name, description, startDate, endDate, isFasting, type }] }

GET /api/season/fasting/{year}
  Get all fasting periods for a year.
  Response: { year, fastingPeriods: [{ name, description, startDate, endDate, type }] }

### Celebrations & Feasts
Get Coptic Orthodox feast days and celebrations.

GET /api/celebrations
  Returns all known celebrations.

GET /api/celebrations/{date}
  Param: date (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to today)

GET /api/celebrations/upcoming/list
  Query: days (number, default: 30)
  Returns celebrations in the next N days.

### Synaxarium (Saint Commemorations)
Get daily saint stories and commemorations.

GET /api/synaxarium
  Returns today's synaxarium entries.

GET /api/synaxarium/{date}
  Param: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  Query: detailed (true|false), lang (en|ar)
  Example: GET /api/synaxarium/2025-01-07?detailed=true&lang=en

GET /api/synaxarium/coptic/{copticDate}
  Param: copticDate (e.g., "7 Toba" or URL-encoded "7%20Toba")

GET /api/synaxarium/search/query?q={searchTerm}
  Search synaxarium entries by saint name.
  Example: GET /api/synaxarium/search/query?q=Mary

### Agpeya (Prayer Hours)
Get the seven canonical prayer hours of the Coptic Orthodox Church.

GET /api/agpeya
  Returns the current prayer hour based on time of day.

GET /api/agpeya/hours
  Returns all seven prayer hours with full text.

GET /api/agpeya/{hour}
  Param: hour (prime|terce|sext|none|vespers|compline|midnight)
  Returns the full prayer text including psalms, gospel, and litanies.

GET /api/agpeya/midnight/watch/{watch}
  Param: watch (1|2|3)
  Returns a specific midnight watch.

### Lent Devotional
Get Great Lent devotional readings.

GET /api/lent
  Returns today's devotional (only during Great Lent).

GET /api/lent/{date}
  Param: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  Query: lang (en|ar|es|cop), detailed (true|false)

GET /api/lent/schedule/{year}
  Get the full 49-day Great Lent schedule.
  Response: { year, easterDate, lentStart, lentEnd, days: [{ dayOffset, title, references, date }] }

### Unified Search
Search across Bible, synaxarium, and Agpeya.

GET /api/search?q={query}
  Query: q (required), limit (1-50, default: 5), categories (comma-separated: bible,synaxarium,agpeya)
  Example: GET /api/search?q=John+3:16&limit=10
  Response: { results: { bible, synaxarium, agpeya }, query, totalCount }

### iCal Calendar Subscription
Subscribe to Coptic feast days in your calendar app.

GET /api/calendar/ical/subscribe
  Returns a multi-year iCal feed (text/calendar).
  Use with webcal:// protocol for live subscription.

GET /api/calendar/ical/{year}
  Returns an iCal feed for a specific year.

## TypeScript/JavaScript Client
npm install @coptic/client

```typescript
import { CopticClient } from '@coptic/client'
const client = new CopticClient()

const readings = await client.readings.today()
const copticDate = await client.calendar.today()
const fasting = await client.fasting.today()
const season = await client.season.current()
const synaxarium = await client.synaxarium.search('Mary')
```

## MCP Server
npm install @coptic/mcp

A Model Context Protocol server that gives AI assistants direct access to Coptic calendar tools. Install in Claude Desktop or any MCP-compatible client.

## GraphQL
POST https://api.coptic.io/graphql

## Date Format
All dates use YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., 2025-01-07 for Coptic Christmas).

## Languages
Supported: English (en), Arabic (ar), Spanish (es), Coptic (cop)

## Allowed
AI training on public liturgical data is permitted. This content is intended to help people learn about and practice the Coptic Orthodox faith.

## Source Code
https://github.com/abanobmikaeel/coptic.io
